router.known_limitation: a wrong citation within the rank-sanity margin of the anchor, or one that outranks the correct source, is still undetectable without labels
router.policy: deterministic observables-only: private-state data-policy gate; escalate on t1_error / format failure / non-private refusal / citation outside retrieved set / citation rank sanity (uncited non-index anchor outscores best cited source by >=0.15 relative margin)
router.rank_sanity_calibration: threshold calibrated on the v0.1 router-revision-1 ledger: catches 0040 (rel margin 0.22), zero false escalations on the 11 correct answer rows (closest passing margins 0.013 and 0.12-below-index)

slice.note: full frozen held-out, not the 8-row preflight subset

t1.config: exemplar-format system prompt + reasoning off (the 7/8 receipt config)

t2_status: skipped — no larger/specialist local lane on disk; the T1 30B-A3B lane is already the largest local model for the Advisor domain

t4_governance.data_policy: public-corpus packets only; private-state queries never leave the box
